question: Among New York City schools that served high school students and reported at least 151 total VADIR incidents in 2013-2014, which schools also had at least 25 total incidents reported by school safety in 2013-2014, a safety and respect score of 7.3 or lower in 2013, and a poverty rate of at least 70% in 2013-2014? Among those schools, which had the highest four-year August graduation rate for the 2014 cohort? How many male athletic teams are named for that school? Please return only the number in the format [Answer].

1.fact:
import io
import os

import boto3
import pandas as pd
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.client import Config

source = 'datagov/2013-2014-vadir-incidents/files/rows.txt'
bucket = 'lakeqa-yc4103-datalake'
local_path = source if os.path.exists(source) else '/tmp/k123_data_cache/' + source
client = boto3.client('s3', region_name='us-east-1', config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))

if os.path.exists(local_path):
    df = pd.read_csv(local_path, low_memory=False)
else:
    obj = client.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
    df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj['Body'].read()), low_memory=False)

df.columns = [
    str(col).strip()
    .replace('Without Weapon(s)', ' Without Weapon(s)')
    .replace('With Weapon(s)', ' With Weapon(s)')
    .replace('  ', ' ')
    for col in df.columns
]

dimension_cols = {
    'School year',
    'School Year',
    'County',
    'District',
    'School Name',
    'BEDS Code',
    'Grade Organization',
    'Need/Resource Category',
    'School Type',
    'Enrollment',
}
incident_cols = [col for col in df.columns if col not in dimension_cols]
nyc_counties = {
    'bronx',
    'bronx county',
    'kings',
    'kings county',
    'brooklyn',
    'new york',
    'new york county',
    'manhattan',
    'queens',
    'queens county',
    'richmond',
    'richmond county',
    'staten island',
}

filtered = df[df['County'].astype(str).str.strip().str.lower().isin(nyc_counties)].copy()
filtered = filtered[filtered['Grade Organization'].astype(str).str.contains('High', case=False, na=False)].copy()
filtered['BEDS Code'] = filtered['BEDS Code'].astype(str).str.strip()
filtered['School Name'] = filtered['School Name'].astype(str).str.strip()
filtered[incident_cols] = filtered[incident_cols].apply(pd.to_numeric, errors='coerce').fillna(0)
filtered['_total_incidents'] = filtered[incident_cols].sum(axis=1)

ranked = (
    filtered.groupby(['BEDS Code', 'School Name'], as_index=False)['_total_incidents']
    .sum()
    .sort_values(['_total_incidents', 'BEDS Code'], ascending=[False, True], kind='mergesort')
    .reset_index(drop=True)
)
qualified = ranked[ranked['_total_incidents'].ge(151)].copy()
answer = [
    f"{row['BEDS Code']} | {row['School Name']}"
    for _, row in qualified.iterrows()
]
1.subquestion: Which New York City schools that served high school students reported at least 151 total VADIR incidents in 2013-2014, and what was each school's Basic Educational Data System code?
answer: 331700011382 | Acad For College Prep & Career Exploration: A College Board Sch
320700011473 | Mott Haven Village Prep High School
331500010448 | Brooklyn Secondary School For Collaborative Studies
342600011566 | Queens High School Of Teaching, Liberal Arts And Sciences

import io
import os

import boto3
import pandas as pd
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.client import Config

source = 'datagov/2013-2014-school-locations/files/rows.txt'
bucket = 'lakeqa-yc4103-datalake'
local_path = source if os.path.exists(source) else '/tmp/k123_data_cache/' + source
client = boto3.client('s3', region_name='us-east-1', config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))

node_1_answer = [
    '353100011460 | Susan E Wagner High School',
    '342700011475 | Richmond Hill High School',
    '331700011382 | Acad For College Prep & Career Exploration: A College Board Sch',
    '331700011533 | School For Democracy And Leadership',
    '331700011600 | Clara Barton High School',
    '320700011473 | Mott Haven Village Prep High School',
    '342400011485 | Grover Cleveland High School',
    '320800011405 | Herbert H Lehman High School',
    '310400011680 | Heritage School (the)',
    '332100011525 | Edward R Murrow High School',
    '342600011435 | Martin Van Buren High School',
    '331500010448 | Brooklyn Secondary School For Collaborative Studies',
    '342500011425 | John Bowne High School',
    '331500011429 | Brooklyn School For Global Studies',
    '332200011495 | Sheepshead Bay High School',
    '343000011445 | William Cullen Bryant High School',
    '321200011267 | Bronx Latin School',
    '332100011410 | Abraham Lincoln High School',
    '353100011440 | New Dorp High School',
    '331700011548 | Brooklyn School For Music & Theater',
    '342600011566 | Queens High School Of Teaching, Liberal Arts And Sciences',
]

lookup = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {'BEDS Code': item.split(' | ')[0].strip(), 'School Name': item.split(' | ', 1)[1].strip()}
        for item in node_1_answer
    ]
)

if os.path.exists(local_path):
    df = pd.read_csv(local_path, low_memory=False)
else:
    obj = client.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
    df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj['Body'].read()), low_memory=False)

locations = df[['BEDS NUMBER', 'ATS SYSTEM CODE']].copy()
locations['BEDS NUMBER'] = pd.to_numeric(locations['BEDS NUMBER'], errors='coerce').astype('Int64').astype(str).str.strip()
locations['ATS SYSTEM CODE'] = locations['ATS SYSTEM CODE'].astype(str).str.strip()
locations = locations.drop_duplicates(subset=['BEDS NUMBER'], keep='first')

matched = lookup.merge(locations, left_on='BEDS Code', right_on='BEDS NUMBER', how='left', validate='one_to_one')
answer = [
    f"{row['School Name']} | {row['ATS SYSTEM CODE']}"
    for _, row in matched.iterrows()
]

answer: Acad For College Prep & Career Exploration: A College Board Sch | 17K382
Mott Haven Village Prep High School | 07X473
Brooklyn Secondary School For Collaborative Studies | 15K448
Queens High School Of Teaching, Liberal Arts And Sciences | 26Q566

import io
import os

import boto3
import pandas as pd
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.client import Config

source = 'datagov/2010-2016-school-safety-report/files/rows.txt'
bucket = 'lakeqa-yc4103-datalake'
local_path = source if os.path.exists(source) else '/tmp/k123_data_cache/' + source
client = boto3.client('s3', region_name='us-east-1', config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))

node_2_answer = [
    'Susan E Wagner High School | 31R460',
    'Richmond Hill High School | 27Q475',
    'Acad For College Prep & Career Exploration: A College Board Sch | 17K382',
    'School For Democracy And Leadership | 17K533',
    'Clara Barton High School | 17K600',
    'Mott Haven Village Prep High School | 07X473',
    'Grover Cleveland High School | 24Q485',
    'Herbert H Lehman High School | 08X405',
    'Heritage School (the) | 04M680',
    'Edward R Murrow High School | 21K525',
    'Martin Van Buren High School | 26Q435',
    'Brooklyn Secondary School For Collaborative Studies | 15K448',
    'John Bowne High School | 25Q425',
    'Brooklyn School For Global Studies | 15K429',
    'Sheepshead Bay High School | 22K495',
    'William Cullen Bryant High School | 30Q445',
    'Bronx Latin School | 12X267',
    'Abraham Lincoln High School | 21K410',
    'New Dorp High School | 31R440',
    'Brooklyn School For Music & Theater | 17K548',
    'Queens High School Of Teaching, Liberal Arts And Sciences | 26Q566',
]

lookup = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {'School Name': item.split(' | ')[0].strip(), 'DBN': item.split(' | ')[1].strip()}
        for item in node_2_answer
    ]
)

if os.path.exists(local_path):
    df = pd.read_csv(local_path, low_memory=False)
else:
    obj = client.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
    df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj['Body'].read()), low_memory=False)

df['DBN'] = df['DBN'].astype(str).str.strip()
df = df[df['School Year'].astype(str).str.strip().eq('2013-14')].copy()
df = df[df['DBN'].str.match(r'^[0-9]{2}[A-Z][0-9]{3}$', na=False)].copy()
for col in ['Major N', 'Oth N', 'NoCrim N', 'Prop N', 'Vio N', 'Register']:
    df[col] = pd.to_numeric(df[col].astype(str).str.replace(',', '', regex=False), errors='coerce')
df = df.sort_values(['DBN', 'Register'], ascending=[True, False], kind='mergesort')
df = df.drop_duplicates(subset=['DBN'], keep='first')
df['_total_reported_incidents'] = df[['Major N', 'Oth N', 'NoCrim N', 'Prop N', 'Vio N']].fillna(0).sum(axis=1)

matched = lookup.merge(df[['DBN', '_total_reported_incidents']], on='DBN', how='left', validate='one_to_one')
qualified = matched[matched['_total_reported_incidents'].ge(25)].copy()
answer = qualified['School Name'].tolist()

import io
import os

import boto3
import pandas as pd
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.client import Config

source = 'datagov/2005-2019-graduation-rates-all/files/rows.txt'
bucket = 'lakeqa-yc4103-datalake'
local_path = source if os.path.exists(source) else '/tmp/k123_data_cache/' + source
client = boto3.client('s3', region_name='us-east-1', config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))

node_3_answer = [
    'Susan E Wagner High School',
    'Clara Barton High School',
    'Grover Cleveland High School',
    'Edward R Murrow High School',
    'Martin Van Buren High School',
    'John Bowne High School',
    'William Cullen Bryant High School',
]
node_4_answer = [
    'Richmond Hill High School',
    'Acad For College Prep & Career Exploration: A College Board Sch',
    'School For Democracy And Leadership',
    'Clara Barton High School',
    'Herbert H Lehman High School',
    'Heritage School (the)',
    'Martin Van Buren High School',
    'John Bowne High School',
    'Brooklyn School For Global Studies',
    'Sheepshead Bay High School',
    'William Cullen Bryant High School',
    'New Dorp High School',
    'Brooklyn School For Music & Theater',
]
node_5_answer = [
    'Richmond Hill High School',
    'Acad For College Prep & Career Exploration: A College Board Sch',
    'School For Democracy And Leadership',
    'Clara Barton High School',
    'Mott Haven Village Prep High School',
    'Grover Cleveland High School',
    'Herbert H Lehman High School',
    'Heritage School (the)',
    'Brooklyn Secondary School For Collaborative Studies',
    'John Bowne High School',
    'Brooklyn School For Global Studies',
    'William Cullen Bryant High School',
    'Bronx Latin School',
    'Brooklyn School For Music & Theater',
]

candidate_schools = sorted(set(node_3_answer) & set(node_4_answer) & set(node_5_answer))
lookup = pd.DataFrame({'School Name': candidate_schools})
lookup['_school_key'] = lookup['School Name'].astype(str).str.strip().str.upper()

if os.path.exists(local_path):
    df = pd.read_csv(local_path, low_memory=False)
else:
    obj = client.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
    df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj['Body'].read()), low_memory=False)

df['DBN'] = df['DBN'].astype(str).str.strip()
df['School Name'] = df['School Name'].astype(str).str.strip()
df['_school_key'] = df['School Name'].str.upper()
df['Cohort Year'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Cohort Year'], errors='coerce')
df['% Grads'] = pd.to_numeric(df['% Grads'], errors='coerce')

filtered = df[
    df['_school_key'].isin(lookup['_school_key'])
    & df['Category'].astype(str).str.strip().eq('All Students')
    & df['Cohort'].astype(str).str.strip().eq('4 year August')
    & df['Cohort Year'].eq(2014)
].copy()
filtered = filtered.drop_duplicates(subset=['_school_key'], keep='first')

matched = lookup.merge(filtered[['_school_key', '% Grads']], on='_school_key', how='left', validate='one_to_one')
matched = matched.sort_values(['% Grads', 'School Name'], ascending=[False, True], kind='mergesort').reset_index(drop=True)
answer = matched.iloc[0]['School Name']
